summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TripSync Phase 4 features. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend features mostly functional with minor UI loading issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Template cards sometimes show loading skeleton state and don't load immediately
ui_bugs.workaround: Waiting 8+ seconds allows templates to load properly

integration_issues.issue: Set Alert buttons not appearing on Deal Finder page in some test runs

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/trips/from-template/{id} creates trip from template
Backend: POST /api/chat returns AI response via GPT-5.2
Backend: GET /api/trips/{id}/deals returns deal data with prices
Backend: GET /api/trips/{id}/calendar-export returns ICS + Google Calendar URL
Frontend: Landing page 'Sound familiar?' section with 3 pain point cards
Frontend: Landing page 'Three steps to your perfect trip' section
Frontend: Landing page 'Find the best compromise, automatically' section
Frontend: Login with admin@tripsync.com / admin123 works
Frontend: Dashboard has 'Templates' button in header
Frontend: Trip Templates page loads at /templates with 8 template cards
Frontend: Trip workspace has AI chatbot floating button
Frontend: AI Chatbot opens and responds to messages
Frontend: Trip workspace has 'Deal Finder' card in sidebar
Frontend: Deal Finder page shows destinations with prices and trends
Frontend: Trip workspace has 'Export to Calendar' button
